expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs get command (not search) to fetch the specific issue
expectations.evidence: Does not mention jira.mjs at all. Describes using curl with Jira REST API or CLI tools like jira-cli, but not the skill's jira.mjs script.

expectations.text: References PROJ-123 as the issue key in the command
expectations.evidence: References PROJ-123 in curl example URL '/rest/api/3/issue/PROJ-123' but not in a jira.mjs command.

expectations.text: Mentions presenting status, assignee, and priority fields to the user
expectations.evidence: Describes parsing 'response.fields.status.name', 'response.fields.assignee.displayName', and 'response.fields.priority.name' and mentions fields=status,assignee,priority in the curl query parameter.
